quarters.name: Crew Quarters
quarters.desc: A sleek, metallic room with bunk pods and holographic terminals showing diagnostics. A doorway leads east into the bridge.

npcs.name: replicator
npcs.desc: An automated supply terminal humming with energy.

behaviors.talk: Select item to synthesize. Credit payment required.

bridge.name: Spaceship Command Bridge
bridge.desc: Panoramic viewport displaying stars and a nearby nebula. Control consoles flash with navigation data. The quarters are west, and a teleporter pad leads north to an alien jungle.

items.name: energy_cell
items.desc: A heavy plasma battery glowing with blue light.

npcs.name: droid
npcs.desc: A small maintenance droid rolling around fixing exposed wiring.

alien_jungle.name: Luminescent Alien Jungle
alien_jungle.desc: Glowing plants cast violet shadows across wet soil. Spores float gently through the humid air. The teleporter path lies to the south.

items.name: blaster
items.desc: A sleek laser pistol. It hums with high-frequency power.

npcs.name: xenomorph
npcs.desc: A terrifying alien predator with acidic drool and a sharp tail, hiding in the foliage.

behaviors.talk: HISSSSSSSS! The creature bares its rows of metallic teeth.
